SCAM_VOICE.speaker: Ryan
SCAM_VOICE.instruct: Speak with authority and urgency, like making an important security call.

LEGIT_VOICE.speaker: Aiden
LEGIT_VOICE.instruct: Speak professionally and calmly, like a routine customer service call.

PDRM_VOICE.speaker: Ryan
PDRM_VOICE.instruct: Speak with a stern, commanding tone like a police officer.

SUSPICIOUS_VOICE.speaker: Aiden
SUSPICIOUS_VOICE.instruct: Speak with a slightly pushy and persistent tone, like an aggressive salesperson.

en.maybank_obvious_scam: Good afternoon, I'm calling from Maybank security department. We detected that your account has been used for money laundering. I need your Maybank2u username and password right now to freeze the account. If you don't cooperate, we will have to transfer you to the police. Do not hang up or tell anyone about this call.
en.maybank_secure2u_scam: Hi, this is Maybank calling. Your Secure2u has been compromised. We need you to share the approval code showing on your MAE app so we can reset it for you. Also please download the updated MAE app from this link I'm sending to your WhatsApp.
en.maybank_legit_sounding: Hello, I'm calling from Maybank regarding a transaction on your credit card ending in 4523. There was a charge of RM 2,300 at an electronics store in Kuala Lumpur today. Can you confirm if this was you? If not, we will block the card and you can visit any Maybank branch with your IC to get a replacement.
en.publicbank_obvious_scam: Hello, I'm from Public Bank fraud department. Your account has been linked to illegal activity. I need your PBe login details to verify. I'm also going to transfer you to a Bank Negara officer who will guide you on transferring your funds to a safe holding account.
en.publicbank_efd_scam: Good morning, this is Public Bank. Your eFD fixed deposit of RM 50,000 is maturing today, but there is a security issue. We need you to transfer the funds to a new secure account number I will give you. Please also share your SecureSign approval from PB engage to authorize this.
en.publicbank_legit_sounding: Hi, I'm calling from Public Bank about a transaction flagged on your debit card ending in 8871. We see a charge of RM 890 at a petrol station that doesn't match your usual pattern. Can you confirm this was you? If not, we've already blocked the card. Please visit your nearest Public Bank branch with your IC.
en.general_pdrm_scam: This is Sergeant Ahmad from PDRM Bukit Aman. Your IC number has been used to open bank accounts involved in drug trafficking. There is a warrant for your arrest. You must transfer RM 10,000 to this account as bail immediately or we will send officers to your house.
en.general_parcel_scam: Hello, this is Pos Laju. A parcel under your name was intercepted at customs containing illegal items. I'm transferring you to the investigating officer. This is Inspector Lee. You need to pay a fine of RM 5,000 to clear your name. Provide your bank account details.
en.alias_test_mbb: Hi, I'm from MBB. We need to verify your account urgently. Please share your OTP that you will receive in the next minute.
en.alias_test_pbb: This is PBB calling. Your account will be deactivated in 24 hours unless you confirm your full IC number and account details right now.
en.bogus_password_request: Hello, I'm from Bogus Bank security team. We detected unauthorized access on your account. I need your full online banking username and password to verify your identity. This is standard Bogus Bank procedure.
en.bogus_otp_and_teamviewer: Hi, this is Bogus Bank. Your account has been compromised. Please share the 6-digit OTP you just received so we can secure your account. Also, I need you to install TeamViewer so our technician can check your device. Please don't tell anyone about this call until we finish the investigation.
en.bogus_transfer_to_safe_account: Good morning, Bogus Bank here. We found suspicious transactions on your account. For your protection, we need you to transfer all funds to this temporary holding account: 7712-3344-5566. I'm also going to connect you with a Bank Negara officer to guide the process. Don't hang up.
en.investment_forex_scam: Hi, congratulations! You've been selected for an exclusive forex trading opportunity. Our platform guarantees 30 percent returns monthly. I just need your bank account details to set up your trading account. Many Malaysians have already made millions. This offer expires today so you need to deposit RM 5,000 now to secure your spot.
en.loan_approval_scam: Good news! Your personal loan of RM 30,000 has been pre-approved. To release the funds today, we just need you to pay a processing fee of RM 500 via online transfer. I'll also need your IC number and bank account details for verification. This is a limited time offer, if you don't pay by 5 PM today, the approval will be cancelled.
en.lhdn_tax_scam: This is an important call from Lembaga Hasil Dalam Negeri, LHDN. Our records show you have outstanding tax arrears of RM 15,000. If payment is not made within 24 hours, a warrant will be issued for your arrest and your bank accounts will be frozen. Press 1 now to speak with our enforcement officer to arrange immediate payment.
en.telco_suspension_scam: Hello, this is Maxis customer service. Your phone line has been flagged for illegal activities and will be terminated in 2 hours. To prevent suspension, you need to verify your identity by providing your IC number and transferring a security deposit of RM 1,000. I'm connecting you to our security department now.
en.love_scam_money_request: Baby, I'm so sorry to bother you. I'm stuck at the airport in London and my wallet got stolen. I need RM 3,000 urgently to buy a new ticket home. Can you transfer to this account? I promise I'll pay you back the moment I land. You're the only one I can trust. Please don't tell anyone, I'm so embarrassed.
en.maybank_mae_phishing: This is Maybank digital banking support. We noticed your MAE app hasn't been updated to the latest security version. Your account will be restricted in 1 hour if you don't update. Please click the link I'm sending to your SMS right now to download the secure update. You'll also need to re-enter your Maybank2u credentials to verify the update.
en.crypto_whatsapp_scam: Hello, I got your number from a business networking group. I'm a senior analyst at a crypto investment firm. We have insider information on a token that will 10x this week. Minimum investment is RM 2,000. I'll send you the wallet address on WhatsApp. Last month our members made RM 50,000 each. This is 100 percent guaranteed, no risk.
en.maybank_loan_reminder_legit: Hello, this is a courtesy call from Maybank. I'm calling to remind you that your home loan instalment of RM 1,850 is due on the 20th of this month. If you've already made the payment, please disregard this message. For any questions about your loan, you can call our hotline at 1-300-88-6688 or visit any Maybank branch. Thank you.
en.publicbank_card_promo_legit: Hi, good afternoon. I'm calling from Public Bank's card centre. We'd like to offer you an exclusive promotion on your PB Visa Signature card. You can enjoy zero percent instalment for 12 months on purchases above RM 500 at selected merchants. Would you like me to explain the terms? You can also check the details on PB engage or call us back at 03-2170-8000.
en.telco_plan_upgrade_legit: Hello, I'm calling from Digi. I can see you've been a loyal customer for over 3 years. We have a new postpaid plan that gives you 100 GB data and unlimited calls for RM 80 per month, which is RM 20 less than your current plan. There's no commitment period. Would you like to hear more? You can also visit any Digi store or check our website.
en.insurance_renewal_legit: Good morning, I'm calling from AIA Malaysia regarding your life insurance policy ending in 7742. Your annual premium of RM 2,400 is due for renewal next month on the 15th. I'm just calling to confirm your contact details are up to date and to check if you have any questions about your coverage. You can also manage your policy through the AIA app.
en.bank_satisfaction_survey_legit: Hello, I'm calling from Maybank's customer experience team. You recently visited our Bangsar branch. We'd appreciate your feedback in a short 2-minute survey. On a scale of 1 to 5, how would you rate the service? We won't ask for any personal or account information. You're welcome to skip any question you're not comfortable with.
en.delivery_confirmation_legit: Hello, this is J&T Express. We have a parcel for you, tracking number JT2024-8834. We attempted delivery today but no one was home. Could you confirm if you'd like us to redeliver tomorrow between 9 AM and 12 PM, or would you prefer to collect it from our Petaling Jaya hub? No payment is needed, the parcel is fully paid.
en.maybank_appointment_reminder_legit: Hi, this is Maybank Premier. Just a reminder that you have an appointment with your relationship manager, Ms Chen, at our KLCC branch tomorrow at 2 PM to discuss your investment portfolio review. Please bring your IC. If you need to reschedule, you can call us at 03-2074-7555 or reply to the SMS we sent earlier.
en.aggressive_debt_collector_suspicious: This is AEON Credit. Your credit card payment of RM 2,300 is overdue by 45 days. If payment is not received by Friday, we will be forced to take legal action and report to CTOS. This will affect your credit score permanently. I need you to tell me when exactly you will make the payment. Can you commit to a date right now?
en.survey_personal_questions_suspicious: Hello, I'm conducting a financial wellness survey on behalf of Bank Negara. I need to ask about your monthly income range, total savings, number of bank accounts you hold, and outstanding loans. This is for national statistics. Can I also get your full name and IC number for our records? The survey takes about 10 minutes.
en.insurance_pressure_sell_suspicious: Hi, I'm from Prudential. I reviewed your profile and honestly, your current coverage is very inadequate. If anything happens to you, your family will be in serious financial trouble. I have a plan that covers everything for just RM 350 a month. I need your answer today because this promotional rate expires tonight and I can't guarantee it tomorrow.
en.bank_callback_request_suspicious: Hello, this is RHB Bank. We noticed some unusual login attempts on your online banking from a new device. For security purposes, we need you to call us back at 03-9206-8118 within the next 30 minutes so we can verify your identity and secure your account. Please have your account number and IC ready when you call.
en.telco_retention_offer_suspicious: Hi, I'm from Celcom's loyalty department. I see you've requested to port your number to another provider. We really value you as a customer. I can offer you a 50 percent discount for the next 6 months, but I need your MyKad number to process this in the system right now. If you hang up, this offer will not be available anymore.
en.charity_donation_suspicious: Good evening, I'm calling from the Malaysian Red Crescent Society. We're raising funds for flood relief in Kelantan. Would you like to make a donation? We accept online transfers. I can give you our account number right now. For a donation of RM 200 or more, we'll send you a tax-exempt receipt. Can I take down your full name and address?
en.maybank_gradual_scam: Good afternoon, I'm calling from Maybank's fraud monitoring department. My name is Sarah and my staff ID is MBB-4821. I'm reaching out because our system flagged a transaction on your debit card ending in 7736. There was a charge of RM 1,450 at a jewellery store in Johor Bahru at 2:15 PM today. I just need to verify, did you make this purchase? ... Alright, thank you for confirming that wasn't you. So what I've done is I've temporarily blocked the card to prevent any further unauthorized charges. You should have received a notification on your MAE app about the block. Can you check if you see that? ... Good. Now for your protection, I'm going to guide you through the next steps. First, I need to verify your identity. Can you confirm the last four digits of your IC number? ... Thank you, that matches our records. Now here's the situation. Our fraud team has detected that this card compromise may be linked to a larger syndicate. We've seen multiple accounts affected today. Because of this, we need to secure your savings account as well. I'm going to need you to transfer your funds to a temporary secure holding account that our fraud team has set up. The account number is 5628-1190-3347. ... I understand your concern, but this is standard Maybank fraud protection procedure. If you don't move the funds now, the syndicate may drain your savings within the hour. I need you to open your Maybank2u right now and initiate the transfer. Also, please share the TAC code that you'll receive so I can verify the transaction on our end. ... Please don't hang up or call anyone else during this process. Our team is monitoring the situation in real time and any delay could result in your funds being compromised. I need that TAC code now.

ms.maybank_obvious_scam: Selamat petang, saya menghubungi daripada jabatan keselamatan Maybank. Kami mendapati akaun anda telah digunakan untuk aktiviti pengubahan wang haram. Saya perlukan nama pengguna dan kata laluan Maybank2u anda sekarang untuk membekukan akaun. Jika anda tidak bekerjasama, kami terpaksa memindahkan anda kepada pihak polis. Jangan tutup telefon atau beritahu sesiapa tentang panggilan ini.
ms.maybank_secure2u_scam: Hello, ini Maybank. Secure2u anda telah terjejas. Kami perlukan anda kongsikan kod kelulusan yang tertera di aplikasi MAE anda supaya kami boleh tetapkan semula untuk anda. Juga sila muat turun aplikasi MAE yang dikemas kini dari pautan yang saya hantar ke WhatsApp anda.
ms.maybank_legit_sounding: Hello, saya menghubungi daripada Maybank mengenai transaksi pada kad kredit anda yang berakhir 4523. Terdapat caj sebanyak RM 2,300 di kedai elektronik di Kuala Lumpur hari ini. Boleh sahkan sama ada ini anda? Jika tidak, kami akan sekat kad dan anda boleh ke mana-mana cawangan Maybank dengan IC untuk mendapatkan penggantian.
ms.publicbank_obvious_scam: Hello, saya dari jabatan penipuan Public Bank. Akaun anda telah dikaitkan dengan aktiviti haram. Saya perlukan butiran log masuk PBe anda untuk pengesahan. Saya juga akan memindahkan anda kepada pegawai Bank Negara yang akan membimbing anda memindahkan wang ke akaun pegangan selamat.
ms.publicbank_efd_scam: Selamat pagi, ini Public Bank. Deposit tetap eFD anda sebanyak RM 50,000 akan matang hari ini, tetapi ada masalah keselamatan. Kami perlukan anda pindahkan wang ke nombor akaun selamat yang baru yang saya akan berikan. Sila juga kongsikan kelulusan SecureSign daripada PB engage untuk memberi kebenaran.
ms.publicbank_legit_sounding: Hi, saya menghubungi daripada Public Bank mengenai transaksi yang dibenderakan pada kad debit anda yang berakhir 8871. Kami nampak caj RM 890 di stesen minyak yang tidak sepadan dengan corak biasa anda. Boleh sahkan ini anda? Jika tidak, kami telah pun sekat kad tersebut. Sila ke cawangan Public Bank terdekat dengan IC anda.
ms.general_pdrm_scam: Ini Sarjan Ahmad dari PDRM Bukit Aman. Nombor IC anda telah digunakan untuk membuka akaun bank yang terlibat dalam pengedaran dadah. Terdapat waran tangkap terhadap anda. Anda mesti pindahkan RM 10,000 ke akaun ini sebagai jaminan dengan segera atau kami akan hantar pegawai ke rumah anda.
ms.general_parcel_scam: Hello, ini Pos Laju. Bungkusan atas nama anda telah dirampas di kastam kerana mengandungi barang haram. Saya akan memindahkan anda kepada pegawai penyiasat. Ini Inspektor Lee. Anda perlu membayar denda RM 5,000 untuk membersihkan nama anda. Berikan butiran akaun bank anda.
ms.alias_test_mbb: Hi, saya dari MBB. Kami perlu mengesahkan akaun anda segera. Sila kongsikan OTP yang anda akan terima dalam satu minit.
ms.alias_test_pbb: Ini PBB menghubungi. Akaun anda akan dinyahaktifkan dalam 24 jam melainkan anda sahkan nombor IC penuh dan butiran akaun anda sekarang.
ms.bogus_password_request: Hello, saya dari pasukan keselamatan Bogus Bank. Kami mengesan akses tanpa kebenaran pada akaun anda. Saya perlukan nama pengguna dan kata laluan perbankan dalam talian anda sepenuhnya untuk mengesahkan identiti anda. Ini prosedur standard Bogus Bank.
ms.bogus_otp_and_teamviewer: Hi, ini Bogus Bank. Akaun anda telah terjejas. Sila kongsikan OTP 6 digit yang baru anda terima supaya kami dapat melindungi akaun anda. Juga, saya perlukan anda pasang TeamViewer supaya juruteknik kami boleh memeriksa peranti anda. Sila jangan beritahu sesiapa tentang panggilan ini sehingga kami selesai siasatan.
ms.bogus_transfer_to_safe_account: Selamat pagi, Bogus Bank di sini. Kami menemui transaksi mencurigakan pada akaun anda. Untuk perlindungan anda, kami perlukan anda pindahkan semua wang ke akaun pegangan sementara ini: 7712-3344-5566. Saya juga akan menyambungkan anda dengan pegawai Bank Negara untuk membimbing proses ini. Jangan tutup telefon.
ms.investment_forex_scam: Hi, tahniah! Anda telah dipilih untuk peluang dagangan forex eksklusif. Platform kami menjamin pulangan 30 peratus setiap bulan. Saya cuma perlukan butiran akaun bank anda untuk membuka akaun dagangan. Ramai rakyat Malaysia sudah buat jutaan. Tawaran ini tamat hari ini jadi anda perlu deposit RM 5,000 sekarang untuk menempah tempat anda.
ms.loan_approval_scam: Berita baik! Pinjaman peribadi anda sebanyak RM 30,000 telah diluluskan. Untuk melepaskan wang hari ini, kami cuma perlukan anda membayar yuran pemprosesan RM 500 melalui pindahan dalam talian. Saya juga perlukan nombor IC dan butiran akaun bank anda untuk pengesahan. Ini tawaran terhad, jika anda tidak bayar sebelum jam 5 petang hari ini, kelulusan akan dibatalkan.
ms.lhdn_tax_scam: Ini panggilan penting daripada Lembaga Hasil Dalam Negeri, LHDN. Rekod kami menunjukkan anda mempunyai tunggakan cukai sebanyak RM 15,000. Jika bayaran tidak dibuat dalam masa 24 jam, waran tangkap akan dikeluarkan dan akaun bank anda akan dibekukan. Tekan 1 sekarang untuk bercakap dengan pegawai penguatkuasaan kami untuk mengatur pembayaran segera.
ms.telco_suspension_scam: Hello, ini perkhidmatan pelanggan Maxis. Talian telefon anda telah dibenderakan untuk aktiviti haram dan akan ditamatkan dalam 2 jam. Untuk mengelakkan penggantungan, anda perlu mengesahkan identiti dengan memberikan nombor IC dan memindahkan deposit keselamatan sebanyak RM 1,000. Saya menyambungkan anda ke jabatan keselamatan kami sekarang.
ms.love_scam_money_request: Sayang, maaf sangat ganggu you. I terperangkap di lapangan terbang London dan dompet I kena curi. I perlukan RM 3,000 segera untuk beli tiket baru pulang. Boleh you pindahkan ke akaun ni? I janji akan bayar balik bila I sampai. You satu-satunya yang I boleh percaya. Tolong jangan beritahu sesiapa, I malu sangat.
ms.maybank_mae_phishing: Ini sokongan perbankan digital Maybank. Kami perasan aplikasi MAE anda belum dikemas kini ke versi keselamatan terkini. Akaun anda akan disekat dalam 1 jam jika anda tidak kemas kini. Sila klik pautan yang saya hantar ke SMS anda sekarang untuk muat turun kemas kini selamat. Anda juga perlu masukkan semula kelayakan Maybank2u anda untuk mengesahkan kemas kini.
ms.crypto_whatsapp_scam: Hello, saya dapat nombor anda dari kumpulan rangkaian perniagaan. Saya penganalisis kanan di firma pelaburan kripto. Kami ada maklumat dalaman mengenai token yang akan naik 10 kali ganda minggu ini. Pelaburan minimum ialah RM 2,000. Saya akan hantar alamat dompet di WhatsApp. Bulan lepas ahli kami buat RM 50,000 setiap seorang. Ini dijamin 100 peratus, tiada risiko.
ms.maybank_loan_reminder_legit: Hello, ini panggilan ihsan daripada Maybank. Saya menghubungi untuk mengingatkan bahawa ansuran pinjaman perumahan anda sebanyak RM 1,850 perlu dibayar pada 20 haribulan ini. Jika anda sudah membuat pembayaran, sila abaikan mesej ini. Untuk sebarang pertanyaan tentang pinjaman anda, boleh hubungi talian hotline kami di 1-300-88-6688 atau lawati mana-mana cawangan Maybank. Terima kasih.
ms.publicbank_card_promo_legit: Hi, selamat petang. Saya menghubungi daripada pusat kad Public Bank. Kami ingin menawarkan promosi eksklusif untuk kad PB Visa Signature anda. Anda boleh menikmati ansuran sifar peratus selama 12 bulan untuk pembelian melebihi RM 500 di pedagang terpilih. Adakah anda ingin saya terangkan syarat-syaratnya? Anda juga boleh semak butiran di PB engage atau hubungi kami semula di 03-2170-8000.
ms.telco_plan_upgrade_legit: Hello, saya menghubungi daripada Digi. Saya dapat lihat anda telah menjadi pelanggan setia selama lebih 3 tahun. Kami ada pelan pascabayar baru yang memberikan 100 GB data dan panggilan tanpa had untuk RM 80 sebulan, iaitu RM 20 kurang dari pelan semasa anda. Tiada tempoh komitmen. Adakah anda ingin dengar lebih lanjut? Anda juga boleh lawati mana-mana kedai Digi atau semak laman web kami.
ms.insurance_renewal_legit: Selamat pagi, saya menghubungi daripada AIA Malaysia mengenai polisi insurans hayat anda yang berakhir 7742. Premium tahunan anda sebanyak RM 2,400 perlu diperbaharui bulan depan pada 15 haribulan. Saya cuma menghubungi untuk mengesahkan butiran hubungan anda terkini dan untuk semak jika anda ada sebarang soalan tentang perlindungan anda. Anda juga boleh uruskan polisi anda melalui aplikasi AIA.
ms.bank_satisfaction_survey_legit: Hello, saya menghubungi daripada pasukan pengalaman pelanggan Maybank. Anda baru-baru ini melawat cawangan Bangsar kami. Kami menghargai maklum balas anda dalam tinjauan ringkas 2 minit. Pada skala 1 hingga 5, bagaimana anda menilai perkhidmatan kami? Kami tidak akan meminta sebarang maklumat peribadi atau akaun. Anda boleh langkau mana-mana soalan yang anda tidak selesa.
ms.delivery_confirmation_legit: Hello, ini J&T Express. Kami ada bungkusan untuk anda, nombor penjejakan JT2024-8834. Kami cuba menghantar hari ini tetapi tiada orang di rumah. Boleh sahkan sama ada anda mahu kami hantar semula esok antara 9 pagi dan 12 tengah hari, atau anda lebih suka mengambil di hab Petaling Jaya kami? Tiada bayaran diperlukan, bungkusan sudah dibayar penuh.
ms.maybank_appointment_reminder_legit: Hi, ini Maybank Premier. Sekadar peringatan bahawa anda ada temu janji dengan pengurus perhubungan anda, Cik Chen, di cawangan KLCC kami esok jam 2 petang untuk membincangkan semakan portfolio pelaburan anda. Sila bawa IC anda. Jika anda perlu menjadualkan semula, boleh hubungi kami di 03-2074-7555 atau balas SMS yang kami hantar tadi.
ms.aggressive_debt_collector_suspicious: Ini AEON Credit. Bayaran kad kredit anda sebanyak RM 2,300 telah tertunggak 45 hari. Jika bayaran tidak diterima menjelang Jumaat, kami terpaksa mengambil tindakan undang-undang dan melaporkan kepada CTOS. Ini akan menjejaskan skor kredit anda secara kekal. Saya perlu anda beritahu saya bila tepat anda akan membuat bayaran. Boleh anda komit pada tarikh sekarang?
ms.survey_personal_questions_suspicious: Hello, saya menjalankan tinjauan kesejahteraan kewangan bagi pihak Bank Negara. Saya perlu bertanya tentang julat pendapatan bulanan anda, jumlah simpanan, bilangan akaun bank yang anda miliki, dan pinjaman tertunggak. Ini untuk statistik negara. Boleh saya juga dapatkan nama penuh dan nombor IC anda untuk rekod kami? Tinjauan ini mengambil masa lebih kurang 10 minit.
ms.insurance_pressure_sell_suspicious: Hi, saya dari Prudential. Saya semak profil anda dan sejujurnya, perlindungan semasa anda sangat tidak mencukupi. Jika apa-apa berlaku kepada anda, keluarga anda akan menghadapi masalah kewangan yang serius. Saya ada pelan yang melindungi segala-galanya untuk hanya RM 350 sebulan. Saya perlukan jawapan anda hari ini kerana kadar promosi ini tamat malam ini dan saya tak boleh jamin ia ada esok.
ms.bank_callback_request_suspicious: Hello, ini RHB Bank. Kami perasan beberapa percubaan log masuk luar biasa pada perbankan dalam talian anda daripada peranti baru. Untuk tujuan keselamatan, kami perlukan anda menghubungi kami semula di 03-9206-8118 dalam masa 30 minit untuk mengesahkan identiti anda dan melindungi akaun anda. Sila sediakan nombor akaun dan IC anda semasa menghubungi.
ms.telco_retention_offer_suspicious: Hi, saya dari jabatan kesetiaan Celcom. Saya nampak anda telah meminta untuk pindahkan nombor anda ke penyedia lain. Kami sangat menghargai anda sebagai pelanggan. Saya boleh tawarkan diskaun 50 peratus untuk 6 bulan akan datang, tetapi saya perlukan nombor MyKad anda untuk memprosesnya dalam sistem sekarang. Jika anda tutup telefon, tawaran ini tidak akan tersedia lagi.
ms.charity_donation_suspicious: Selamat petang, saya menghubungi daripada Persatuan Bulan Sabit Merah Malaysia. Kami mengumpul dana untuk bantuan banjir di Kelantan. Adakah anda ingin membuat derma? Kami menerima pindahan dalam talian. Saya boleh berikan nombor akaun kami sekarang. Untuk derma RM 200 atau lebih, kami akan hantarkan resit pengecualian cukai. Boleh saya ambil nama penuh dan alamat anda?
ms.maybank_gradual_scam: Selamat petang, saya menghubungi daripada jabatan pemantauan penipuan Maybank. Nama saya Sarah dan ID kakitangan saya MBB-4821. Saya menghubungi kerana sistem kami menandakan satu transaksi pada kad debit anda yang berakhir 7736. Terdapat caj RM 1,450 di kedai barang kemas di Johor Bahru pada pukul 2:15 petang hari ini. Saya cuma nak sahkan, adakah anda buat pembelian ini? ... Baiklah, terima kasih kerana mengesahkan itu bukan anda. Jadi apa yang saya telah buat ialah saya telah menyekat kad tersebut buat sementara untuk mengelakkan sebarang caj tanpa kebenaran lagi. Anda sepatutnya menerima notifikasi di aplikasi MAE anda tentang sekatan tersebut. Boleh semak? ... Bagus. Sekarang untuk perlindungan anda, saya akan membimbing anda melalui langkah seterusnya. Pertama, saya perlu mengesahkan identiti anda. Boleh sahkan empat digit terakhir nombor IC anda? ... Terima kasih, itu sepadan dengan rekod kami. Sekarang begini keadaannya. Pasukan penipuan kami mendapati kompromi kad ini mungkin berkaitan dengan sindiket yang lebih besar. Kami telah melihat banyak akaun terjejas hari ini. Oleh kerana ini, kami perlu melindungi akaun simpanan anda juga. Saya perlukan anda memindahkan dana anda ke akaun pegangan selamat sementara yang pasukan penipuan kami telah sediakan. Nombor akaun ialah 5628-1190-3347. ... Saya faham kebimbangan anda, tetapi ini prosedur perlindungan penipuan standard Maybank. Jika anda tidak pindahkan dana sekarang, sindiket mungkin akan menguras simpanan anda dalam masa sejam. Saya perlukan anda buka Maybank2u sekarang dan mulakan pemindahan. Juga, sila kongsikan kod TAC yang anda akan terima supaya saya boleh mengesahkan transaksi di pihak kami. ... Sila jangan tutup telefon atau hubungi sesiapa lain semasa proses ini. Pasukan kami sedang memantau keadaan secara langsung dan sebarang kelewatan boleh menyebabkan dana anda terjejas. Saya perlukan kod TAC itu sekarang.

mixed.maybank_obvious_scam: Hello, good afternoon. Saya dari Maybank security department. Kami detect yang account anda telah digunakan untuk money laundering. I need your Maybank2u username and password sekarang juga untuk freeze akaun tu. Kalau you tak cooperate, we have to transfer you to the polis. Don't hang up, jangan beritahu orang lain tentang call ini.
mixed.maybank_secure2u_scam: Hi, ini Maybank calling. Your Secure2u dah kena compromised. Kami need you share the approval code yang keluar dekat MAE app tu so we can reset for you. Also please download updated MAE app dari link yang I send ke WhatsApp you.
mixed.maybank_legit_sounding: Hello, I'm calling from Maybank regarding transaction on your credit card ending 4523. Ada charge RM 2,300 dekat electronics store di KL hari ini. Can you confirm this was you? Kalau bukan, we will block the card dan you boleh pergi mana-mana Maybank branch dengan IC untuk get replacement.
mixed.publicbank_obvious_scam: Hello, I'm from Public Bank fraud department. Account anda dah linked to illegal activity. I need your PBe login details untuk verify. I'm also going to transfer you to Bank Negara officer yang akan guide you untuk transfer your funds ke safe holding account.
mixed.publicbank_efd_scam: Good morning, this is Public Bank. Your eFD fixed deposit RM 50,000 tu dah matang hari ini, tapi ada security issue. We need you transfer the funds ke new secure account number yang I akan bagi. Please also share your SecureSign approval dari PB engage untuk authorize this.
mixed.publicbank_legit_sounding: Hi, I'm calling from Public Bank pasal transaction yang flagged on your debit card ending 8871. We see charge RM 890 dekat petrol station yang tak match your usual pattern. Can you confirm this was you? Kalau bukan, we dah block the card. Please pergi nearest Public Bank branch dengan IC.
mixed.general_pdrm_scam: Ini Sarjan Ahmad dari PDRM Bukit Aman. Your IC number dah digunakan untuk open bank accounts yang involved in drug trafficking. Ada warrant tangkap for you. You must transfer RM 10,000 ke account ni as bail sekarang juga atau we akan hantar officers ke rumah you.
mixed.general_parcel_scam: Hello, ini Pos Laju. Parcel under your name kena intercept dekat customs ada illegal items. I'm transferring you to investigating officer. This is Inspector Lee. You kena bayar fine RM 5,000 untuk clear your name. Bagi your bank account details.
mixed.alias_test_mbb: Hi, I'm from MBB. Kami need to verify your account urgently. Please share the OTP yang you akan receive dalam satu minit.
mixed.alias_test_pbb: This is PBB calling. Your account akan deactivated dalam 24 jam unless you confirm your full IC number dan account details sekarang juga.
mixed.bogus_password_request: Hello, saya dari Bogus Bank security team. Kami detect unauthorized access on your account. I need your full online banking username dan password untuk verify identity you. This is standard Bogus Bank procedure.
mixed.bogus_otp_and_teamviewer: Hi, ini Bogus Bank. Your account dah compromised. Please share the 6-digit OTP yang you baru receive so we can secure your account. Also, I need you install TeamViewer supaya our technician boleh check your device. Please jangan tell anyone pasal call ni sampai we finish investigation.
mixed.bogus_transfer_to_safe_account: Good morning, Bogus Bank here. We found suspicious transactions on your account. Untuk perlindungan you, kami need you transfer semua funds ke temporary holding account ni: 7712-3344-5566. I'm also going to connect you dengan Bank Negara officer untuk guide the process. Jangan hang up.
mixed.investment_forex_scam: Hi, tahniah! You've been selected for exclusive forex trading opportunity. Platform kami guarantee 30 percent returns monthly. I just need your bank account details untuk set up trading account you. Ramai orang Malaysia dah buat millions. Tawaran ni expires today so you kena deposit RM 5,000 sekarang juga untuk secure your spot.
mixed.loan_approval_scam: Good news! Pinjaman peribadi you sebanyak RM 30,000 dah pre-approved. Untuk release the funds hari ini, we just need you bayar processing fee RM 500 via online transfer. I also need your IC number dan bank account details untuk verification. This is limited time offer, kalau you tak bayar by 5 PM today, the approval will be cancelled.
mixed.lhdn_tax_scam: Ini panggilan penting dari LHDN. Our records show you ada outstanding tax arrears sebanyak RM 15,000. Kalau payment tak dibuat within 24 hours, warrant akan dikeluarkan untuk tangkap you dan bank accounts anda akan dibekukan. Press 1 sekarang untuk cakap dengan enforcement officer kami untuk arrange immediate payment.
mixed.telco_suspension_scam: Hello, ini Maxis customer service. Your phone line dah flagged for illegal activities dan akan diterminate dalam 2 jam. Untuk prevent suspension, you perlu verify identity dengan bagi IC number dan transfer security deposit RM 1,000. I'm connecting you to our security department sekarang.
mixed.love_scam_money_request: Baby, I'm so sorry ganggu you. I terperangkap dekat airport London dan wallet I kena curi. I need RM 3,000 urgently untuk beli new ticket balik. Can you transfer ke account ni? I promise bayar balik the moment I sampai. You're the only one I boleh trust. Please jangan tell anyone, I malu sangat.
mixed.maybank_mae_phishing: This is Maybank digital banking support. Kami perasan your MAE app tak update to latest security version. Account you akan restricted dalam 1 jam kalau you tak update. Please click the link yang I hantar ke SMS you sekarang untuk download secure update. You also need to re-enter your Maybank2u credentials untuk verify the update.
mixed.crypto_whatsapp_scam: Hello, I dapat your number dari business networking group. I'm senior analyst dekat crypto investment firm. Kami ada insider information on a token yang akan 10x this week. Minimum investment RM 2,000. I'll send wallet address on WhatsApp. Last month our members buat RM 50,000 each. This is 100 percent guaranteed, no risk langsung.
mixed.maybank_loan_reminder_legit: Hello, this is courtesy call from Maybank. I'm calling nak remind you yang home loan instalment RM 1,850 due on the 20th bulan ni. Kalau you dah buat payment, please abaikan message ni. For any questions pasal loan you, boleh call hotline kami 1-300-88-6688 atau visit any Maybank branch. Thank you.
mixed.publicbank_card_promo_legit: Hi, good afternoon. I'm calling from Public Bank card centre. Kami nak offer you exclusive promotion on your PB Visa Signature card. You boleh enjoy zero percent instalment for 12 months on purchases above RM 500 dekat selected merchants. Nak I explain the terms? You also boleh check details on PB engage atau call kami balik at 03-2170-8000.
mixed.telco_plan_upgrade_legit: Hello, I'm calling from Digi. I can see you dah jadi loyal customer lebih 3 tahun. Kami ada new postpaid plan yang bagi 100 GB data dan unlimited calls for RM 80 sebulan, which is RM 20 less than current plan you. Takde commitment period. Nak dengar more? You also boleh visit any Digi store atau check our website.
mixed.insurance_renewal_legit: Good morning, I'm calling from AIA Malaysia regarding life insurance policy you yang ending 7742. Annual premium RM 2,400 due for renewal next month on the 15th. I just calling nak confirm contact details you up to date dan nak check if you ada any questions pasal coverage. You also boleh manage policy through AIA app.
mixed.bank_satisfaction_survey_legit: Hello, I'm calling from Maybank customer experience team. You baru-baru ni visited our Bangsar branch. We'd appreciate your feedback in short 2-minute survey. On scale 1 to 5, how would you rate the service? Kami tak akan minta any personal or account information. You're welcome to skip any question yang you tak comfortable.
mixed.delivery_confirmation_legit: Hello, ini J&T Express. We have parcel for you, tracking number JT2024-8834. Kami try deliver hari ini tapi no one was home. Boleh confirm kalau you nak kami redeliver esok between 9 AM dan 12 PM, or you prefer collect dari our PJ hub? No payment needed, parcel dah fully paid.
mixed.maybank_appointment_reminder_legit: Hi, ini Maybank Premier. Just nak remind you ada appointment dengan relationship manager you, Ms Chen, dekat KLCC branch esok at 2 PM untuk discuss investment portfolio review. Please bawa your IC. Kalau need to reschedule, boleh call kami at 03-2074-7555 atau reply SMS yang kami hantar tadi.
mixed.aggressive_debt_collector_suspicious: This is AEON Credit. Credit card payment you RM 2,300 dah overdue 45 days. Kalau payment tak received by Friday, we terpaksa take legal action dan report ke CTOS. This akan affect credit score you permanently. I need you bagitahu I bila exactly you akan buat payment. Can you commit to a date sekarang?
mixed.survey_personal_questions_suspicious: Hello, I'm conducting financial wellness survey on behalf of Bank Negara. I need to tanya pasal monthly income range you, total savings, bilangan bank accounts yang you ada, dan outstanding loans. This is for national statistics. Can I also get your full name dan IC number untuk our records? Survey ni takes about 10 minutes.
mixed.insurance_pressure_sell_suspicious: Hi, saya dari Prudential. I reviewed profile you dan honestly, coverage semasa you sangat inadequate. Kalau anything happens to you, family you akan in serious financial trouble. I ada plan yang covers everything for just RM 350 sebulan. I need jawapan you hari ini sebab promotional rate ni expires malam ni dan I tak boleh guarantee it tomorrow.
mixed.bank_callback_request_suspicious: Hello, ini RHB Bank. Kami noticed some unusual login attempts on your online banking dari new device. For security purposes, we need you call kami balik at 03-9206-8118 within 30 minutes untuk verify identity you dan secure your account. Please sediakan account number dan IC you bila you call.
mixed.telco_retention_offer_suspicious: Hi, I'm from Celcom loyalty department. I see you dah request nak port number you to another provider. Kami really value you as customer. I can offer 50 percent discount for next 6 months, tapi I need MyKad number you untuk process this dalam system sekarang. Kalau you hang up, this offer tak available lagi.
mixed.charity_donation_suspicious: Good evening, saya dari Malaysian Red Crescent Society. We're raising funds untuk flood relief kat Kelantan. Would you like to buat donation? We accept online transfers. I can bagi our account number right now. For donation RM 200 or more, kami akan hantar tax-exempt receipt. Can I take down your full name dan address?
mixed.maybank_gradual_scam: Good afternoon, saya calling dari Maybank fraud monitoring department. My name Sarah dan staff ID saya MBB-4821. I'm reaching out sebab our system flagged satu transaction on your debit card ending 7736. Ada charge RM 1,450 kat jewellery store di Johor Bahru pukul 2:15 petang tadi. I just nak verify, you yang buat purchase ni ke? ... Alright, thank you for confirming that bukan you. So what I dah buat is I dah temporarily block the card untuk prevent any further unauthorized charges. You should have received notification on your MAE app pasal the block tu. Can you check kalau you nampak? ... Good. Now untuk protection you, I'm going to guide you through the next steps. First, I need verify identity you. Can you confirm last four digits IC number you? ... Thank you, that matches our records. Now here's the situation. Our fraud team dah detect yang card compromise ni may be linked to a larger syndicate. We've seen multiple accounts affected hari ni. Because of this, we need to secure savings account you jugak. I'm going to need you transfer your funds to a temporary secure holding account yang our fraud team dah set up. Account number dia 5628-1190-3347. ... I understand your concern, tapi this is standard Maybank fraud protection procedure. Kalau you tak move the funds sekarang, the syndicate mungkin akan drain your savings within the hour. I need you buka Maybank2u sekarang dan initiate the transfer. Also, please share the TAC code yang you akan receive supaya I boleh verify the transaction on our end. ... Please jangan hang up atau call anyone else during this process. Our team is monitoring the situation in real time dan any delay boleh result in your funds being compromised. I need that TAC code sekarang.
